log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Astral Elf — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:19+9=28 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Astral Elf — Winged Striker (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Astral Elf — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:10+9=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Astral Elf — Winged Striker. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Astral Elf — Winged Striker.
→ Astral Elf — Winged Striker: CON save [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 14 necrotic damage (half).

══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Astral Elf — Winged Striker --- HP: 36/67 | AC: 14

--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:10+9=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
